text_block_list.text:
The day has finally come for Mihono Bourbon's
debut race.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Initiating scan. Heart rate and blood pressure
normal. These results indicate that I am relaxed.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Put simply, I am not nervous. However, I can
become nervous if necessary. Are those your
orders?
Her typical calmness brings me some relief.
choice_data_list: Get out there and run as fast as you can!
Get out there and run as fast as you can!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Order acknowledged. I will execute your
command.
